# IVL Product Card Template

## Purpose

Defines the ideal CyberMedica card for ventilators and respiratory support
devices.

## Required Sections

- Identity: manufacturer, model, variant, registration number, status, country.
- Classification: ИВЛ type, patient group, care setting.
- Documents: RU, IFU/user manual, datasheet, service manual if available.
- Ventilation characteristics: modes, tidal volume, pressure ranges, flow, oxygen settings.
- Monitoring/alarms: monitored parameters, alarm groups, safety limits.
- Electrical: mains, battery, runtime, power.
- Compatibility: circuits, humidifiers, masks, accessories, software/options.
- Consumables: breathing circuits, filters, sensors.
- Maintenance/service: service intervals, calibration, cleaning.
- Warnings/contraindications: IFU-backed only.
- Procurement notes: required documents and risky substitutions.
- Evidence: source documents and locators.

## Critical Fields

- patient group;
- ventilation modes;
- tidal volume range;
- pressure and flow ranges;
- alarm capability;
- oxygen settings;
- power and battery;
- compatible circuits/accessories.

## Safety

Never publish modes, compatibility or patient group without IFU/manual evidence
and reviewer approval.
